user_system_path: Between rungs. The live product thread is the GUARDIAN (workday-presence): it fires, grounds a real commitment, and pings Slack only when it has a reviewable move. This session shipped #397 (brief seeds the matched draft at generation time, deterministic — retiring the fuzzy recycle for the brief path) and #399 (commitment-title hygiene — the card no longer shows the SYNC: dedup key). The one live-readiness blocker is owner-side: the free external 15-min cron for firing cadence. Remaining code candidates: cyan favicons (tooling-blocked), stale-branch/skipped-test triage. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state and the owner has a boot prompt for the next session.
next_command: New session: read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md + FOLDERA_MASTER_BIBLE.md Part II-B; the owner names the next seam — likely the owner-side external 15-min cron for guardian firing cadence (the one live-readiness blocker), or a code candidate (cyan favicons once image tooling exists; stale-branch/skipped-test triage).
